senses.gloss: to shift, to change, to become different

examples.text: اَلطَّبَقَاتُ ٱلْخَارِجِيَّةُ لِلشَّمْسِ سَوْفَ تَتَوَسَّعُ وَيَتَحَوَّلُ لَوْنُهَا.
examples.english: The sun's outer layers will expand and its colour will shift.

examples.text: إِنَّهَا أُسْطُورَةٌ عِنْدَ ٱلْأَمْرِيكِيِّينَ ٱلْأَصْلِيِّينَ يَتَحَوَّلُ فِيهَا ٱلْبَشَرُ إِلَى حَيَوَانَاتٍ.
examples.english: It's a Native American myth where the humans transform into animals.

senses.gloss: to deviate, to digress, to go away
